headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 16-17, 2026**
article:
The Chicago Cubs dominated the New York Mets with a 12-4 victory, led by Moisés Ballesteros' 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. Edward Cabrera earned the win for the Cubs. In other action, the Baltimore Orioles secured a 6-4 win over the Cleveland Guardians, with Daniel Schneemann recording 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs. The Atlanta Braves shut out the Philadelphia Phillies 9-0, while the San Francisco Giants took down the Washington Nationals 10-5.

Injuries and availability have impacted several teams. The Seattle Mariners placed Patrick Wisdom on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain, effective retroactive to April 15, 2026. The Detroit Tigers placed Zach McKinstry on the 10-day injured list with left hip/abdominal inflammation, while the Houston Astros transferred Josh Hader to the 60-day injured list with left biceps tendinitis. Other teams have also suffered injuries, including the Chicago Cubs, Washington Nationals, Texas Rangers, and more.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place. The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade with the Baltimore Orioles. The Dodgers sent RHP Axel Perez to the Orioles in exchange for McDermott. The New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash, while the Milwaukee Brewers acquired RHP Junior Fernández from the Arizona Diamondbacks. The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers for Future Considerations and International Bonus Pool Money.

top_news.title: **Cubs Rout Mets 12-4 in Dominant Performance**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs secured a convincing 12-4 victory over the New York Mets, with Moisés Ballesteros leading the Mets' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. Edward Cabrera earned the win for the Cubs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Guardians in Thrilling 6-4 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a hard-fought win against the Cleveland Guardians, with a final score of 6-4. Daniel Schneemann led the Orioles' offense with a standout performance, recording 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Braves Shut Out Phillies 9-0**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves dominated the Philadelphia Phillies, securing a 9-0 victory. Austin Riley led the Braves' offense with two home runs and four RBIs.

top_news.title: **Giants Take Down Nationals 10-5**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a 10-5 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Heliot Ramos leading the charge at the plate. Ramos hit a home run and drove in four runs, while Logan Webb earned the win on the mound.

top_news.title: **Mariners Place Patrick Wisdom on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners first baseman Patrick Wisdom has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain, effective retroactive to April 15, 2026.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire RHP Chayce McDermott in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers made a move on April 16, 2026, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade. McDermott joins the Dodgers after being dealt from the Baltimore Orioles.
